subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who desireth to drink from the Kawthar of inner meanings, from the cup of God's bounty, the Lord of all worlds. Verily, the Wronged One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اراد ان یشرب کوثر المعانی من کاس عنایه الله رب العالمین ان المظلوم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment
